response.justification: James is a seasoned generalist software engineer with ~15 years of experience across web, mobile, and high-performance backend systems, and his recent MCP code-generator and agentic-workflow tooling work at re:cinq touches the role's domain. However, the role requires 8+ years building production-grade AI solutions, and his AI/GenAI exposure appears limited to roughly the past year. There is no demonstrated experience with RAG architectures, vector databases, LLM evaluation pipelines, or AI data pipelines, and Python is absent from his skill set. He falls well short of the core staff-level GenAI requirements despite strong general engineering credentials.
strengths: 15+ years of broad production engineering experience, including staff-level roles and customer-facing consulting work
Recent hands-on MCP and agentic-workflow tooling experience directly relevant to the key technologies
Strong TypeScript/Node.js depth plus cloud/infrastructure exposure (AWS CDK, Kubernetes, Docker)
concerns: Nowhere near the required 8+ years building AI-driven solutions; GenAI exposure is ~1 year
No evidence of RAG, vector databases, LLM evaluation/observability, or AI data pipeline work
Python, a primary language for the role, is not listed among his skills

key_factors.factor: Recent MCP/agentic tooling and strong general engineering background
